description_short: Unable to verify company details — website currently inaccessible (Error 403). Categorized as non-profit credit counseling based on URL and current classification.
description_long: Parachute Credit Counseling, Inc. is listed in the free-help category, which typically includes non-profit credit counseling organizations and HUD-approved housing counselors. The company's website URL (parachutecreditcounseling.org) suggests a legitimate non-profit structure aligned with consumer financial education. However, the website is currently returning an Error 403 (Access Denied) message with IP geolocation blocking, preventing verification of current services, credentials, certifications, or operational status. Without accessible website content, specific details about counseling offerings, NFCC certification status, accreditation, counselor qualifications, or service areas cannot be confirmed. The company may be experiencing temporary technical issues, undergoing website maintenance, or may have changed hosting or operational status. For consumers seeking to verify this organization's legitimacy, NFCC membership status can be independently confirmed through the National Foundation for Credit Counseling database, and HUD-approved status through HUD.gov's counselor directory. The access restriction prevents assessment of whether this organization continues active operations or maintains compliance with non-profit credit counseling standards.
